description: 프롬프트 키워드(디멘션) 정의 스냅샷. 값(코드/이름)은 저장하지 않고 런타임에 DS_SQL 로 동적 해석한다. t_xlig_dimension_list(ML_DS_DIV_CD='DS', DEL_F='N') + t_xlig_query_prompt(label/operator)에서 생성.

source.ml_filter: ML_DS_DIV_CD='ML' 디멘션을 t_xlig_dimension_list.DBMS_ID = t_xlig_hierarchy_list.ML_ID 로 연결하고 ML_DBMS_ID='QUADMAX_SDZ' 인 계층(ml_qry_nm/ml_qry)만 ml_hierarchy 로 부착

value_column_convention: DS_SQL 결과의 첫 컬럼=코드, 둘째 컬럼=이름

dimensions.ds_sql: SELECT CD, CD_NAME FROM CRM_CM_CODE WHERE CD_GROUP_TYPE = 'CAMP' AND CD_GROUP_CD = 'CHANNEL_AGREE_YN' order by cd desc
SELECT CD, CD_NAME FROM CRM_CM_CODE WHERE CD_GROUP_TYPE = 'MALL' AND CD_GROUP_CD = 'SNS_CHANNEL_CD' ORDER BY SORT_NO

SELECT *
  FROM T_LOOKUP_VALUE
 WHERE LOOKUP_TYPE_ID = 'DIMENSION_LIST'

  from quadmax_sdz.z_campaign A

where 1 = 1
and A.CAMP_END_DT <= date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') /* 이미 종료된 캠페인만 조회*/
group by CAMP_ID,CAMP_NM
limit 10

SELECT * 
   FROM TEST A
WHERE A.TEST_ID != NULL

SELECT
    t1.number,
    CASE
        -- 숫자 0-9 (10개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 9 THEN CAST((t1.number % 76) + 1 AS CHAR)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 10 THEN '0'

        -- 영문 대문자 A-Z (26개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 35
            THEN CHAR(ASCII('A') + ((t1.number % 76) - 11))

        -- 영문 소문자 a-z (26개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 61
            THEN CHAR(ASCII('a') + ((t1.number % 76) - 37))

        -- 한글 가-하 (14개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 63 THEN '가'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 64 THEN '나'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 65 THEN '다'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 66 THEN '라'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 67 THEN '마'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 68 THEN '바'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 69 THEN '사'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 70 THEN '아'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 71 THEN '자'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 72 THEN '차'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 73 THEN '카'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 74 THEN '타'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 75 THEN '파'
        ELSE '하'
        END as number2
FROM (
         SELECT (@row := @row + 1) as number
         FROM information_schema.tables A
                  CROSS JOIN information_schema.tables B,
              (SELECT @row := 0) AS r
         LIMIT 300000
     ) t1;
SELECT TL_ID AS CD , TL_NM AS CD_NAME FROM quadmax_sdz.T_TARGETLIST WHERE TL_ID like 'SV%' ORDER BY TL_ID DESC

 GROUP BY CUR_CD 
     , CUR_CD

        , A.AGE_DIV1_NM

ml_hierarchy.ml_qry:
SELECT A.CATE_NO AS CD  
     , A.CATE_NM AS CD_NM 
  FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP A
 WHERE A.DEPT_LVL = '1'
 ORDER BY A.CATE_NO

SELECT CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NO ELSE B.CATE_NO END CD   
              ,  CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NM ELSE B.CATE_NM END CD_NM
  FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP A
       LEFT OUTER JOIN QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP B
    ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
 WHERE 1=1
 [AND A.CATE_NO IN @@대분류@@]

SELECT CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NO ELSE B.CATE_NO END CD
     , CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NM ELSE B.CATE_NM END CD_NM
  FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP A
       LEFT OUTER JOIN QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP B
    ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
 WHERE 1=1
 [AND A.CATE_NO IN @@중분류@@]

SELECT CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NO ELSE B.CATE_NO END CD
     , CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NM ELSE B.CATE_NM END CD_NM
  FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP A
       LEFT OUTER JOIN QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP B
    ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
 WHERE 1=1
 [AND A.CATE_NO IN @@소분류@@]

SELECT A.CATE_NO, A.CATE_NM FROM T_CATE_TEMP A
LEFT OUTER JOIN T_CATE_TEMP B 
ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
WHERE 1=1
AND A.DEPT_LVL = 1
GROUP BY A.CATE_NO, A.CATE_NM
ORDER BY A.CATE_NO

SELECT CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NO ELSE B.CATE_NO END CATE_NO,
CASE WHEN B.CATE_NM IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NM ELSE B.CATE_NM END CATE_NM
FROM T_CATE_TEMP A
LEFT OUTER JOIN T_CATE_TEMP B 
ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
WHERE 1=1
AND A.DEPT_LVL = 1
 [AND A.CATE_NO = @@대분류@@]
GROUP BY B.CATE_NO, B.CATE_NM
ORDER BY B.CATE_NO
36308

SELECT CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NO ELSE B.CATE_NO END CATE_NO,
CASE WHEN B.CATE_NM IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NM ELSE B.CATE_NM END CATE_NM
FROM T_CATE_TEMP A
LEFT OUTER JOIN T_CATE_TEMP B 
ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
WHERE 1=1
AND A.DEPT_LVL IN (1,2)
 [AND A.CATE_NO = @@중분류@@]
GROUP BY B.CATE_NO, B.CATE_NM
ORDER BY B.CATE_NO

SELECT CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NO ELSE B.CATE_NO END CATE_NO,
CASE WHEN B.CATE_NM IS NULL THEN A.CATE_NM ELSE B.CATE_NM END CATE_NM
FROM T_CATE_TEMP A
LEFT OUTER JOIN T_CATE_TEMP B 
ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
WHERE 1=1
AND A.DEPT_LVL IN (1,2,3)
 [AND A.CATE_NO = @@소분류@@]
 [AND A.CATE_NO  IN @@SEARCH_CODE@@]
 [AND A.CATE_NM ::op:: @@SEARCH_WORD@@]
GROUP BY B.CATE_NO, B.CATE_NM
ORDER BY B.CATE_NO

select CAMP_GRP_ID
     , CAMP_GRP_NM
  from quadmax_sdz.t_camp_group  
where DEL_F = 'N'
     and CAMP_GRP_END_DT >= sysdate()

select CAMP_ID
     , CAMP_NM 
  from quadmax_sdz.t_campaign
where 1 = 1
and CAMP_GRP_ID = @@그룹@@
and DEL_F = 'N' /* 삭제플래그 처리 */
and CAMP_END_DT >= date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') /* 조회일자보다 종료일이 나중인 캠페인 리스트만 조회*/

select CAMP_GRP_ID
     , CAMP_GRP_NM
  from quadmax_sdz.t_camp_group  
 where DEL_F = 'N' /* 삭제플래그 처리 */
   and CAMP_GRP_END_DT >= date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') /* 조회일자보다 종료일이 나중인 캠페인 리스트만 조회*/

select A.CAMP_ID
     , A.CAMP_NM 
  from quadmax_sdz.z_campaign A
       inner join quadmax_sdz.z_chnl_send_req_cust B
    on A.CAMP_ID = B.CAMP_ID      
where 1 = 1
and A.CAMP_END_DT <= date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') /* 이미 종료된 캠페인만 조회*/
group by CAMP_ID,CAMP_NM
limit 10

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(CAMP_START_DT, 1, 4) AS CD, 
    CONCAT(SUBSTR(CAMP_START_DT, 1, 4), '년') AS nm
FROM 
    quadmax_sdz.z_campaign 
WHERE 
    CAMP_START_DT < SYSDATE()
GROUP BY  
    SUBSTR(CAMP_START_DT, 1, 4), 
    CONCAT(SUBSTR(CAMP_START_DT, 1, 4), '년')
ORDER BY 
    CD DESC

select A.CAMP_ID
     , A.CAMP_NM 
  from quadmax_sdz.z_campaign A
       inner join quadmax_sdz.z_chnl_send_req_cust B 
    on A.CAMP_ID = B.CAMP_ID
 where 1 = 1 
 [and substr( A.CAMP_START_DT ,1,4)= @@기간@@] 
   
group by A.CAMP_ID, A.CAMP_NM

select CAMP_EXEC_NO as cd , CAMP_EXEC_NO as nm
   from quadmax_sdz.z_campaign 
where  1=1
[AND CAMP_ID =@@캠페인@@]

WHERE 1=1

where 1=1
[a.projectid ::op:: @@설문ID@@]

SELECT 
    t1.number,
    CASE 
        -- 숫자 0-9 (10개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 9 THEN CAST((t1.number % 76) + 1 AS CHAR)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 10 THEN '0'
        
        -- 영문 대문자 A-Z (26개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 35 
        THEN CHAR(ASCII('A') + ((t1.number % 76) - 11))
        
        -- 영문 소문자 a-z (26개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) <= 61 
        THEN CHAR(ASCII('a') + ((t1.number % 76) - 37))
        
        -- 한글 가-하 (14개)
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 63 THEN '가'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 64 THEN '나'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 65 THEN '다'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 66 THEN '라'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 67 THEN '마'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 68 THEN '바'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 69 THEN '사'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 70 THEN '아'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 71 THEN '자'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 72 THEN '차'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 73 THEN '카'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 74 THEN '타'
        WHEN (t1.number % 76) = 75 THEN '파'
        ELSE '하'
    END as number2
FROM (
    SELECT (@row := @row + 1) as number
    FROM information_schema.tables A 
    CROSS JOIN information_schema.tables B,
    (SELECT @row := 0) AS r 
    LIMIT 300000
) t1;

SELECT CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL
             THEN A.CATE_NO
             ELSE B.CATE_NO
        END CATE_NO
      , CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL
             THEN A.CATE_NM
             ELSE B.CATE_NM
        END CATE_NM
      , CASE WHEN B.CATE_NO IS NULL
             THEN A.DEPT_LVL
             ELSE B.DEPT_LVL
        END DEPT_LVL
   FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP A
        LEFT OUTER JOIN QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP B
     ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
  WHERE 1=1
 [ AND A.CATE_NO = @@대분류@@]

SELECT A.CATE_NO
     , A.CATE_NM
     , A.DEPT_LVL
  FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP A
       LEFT OUTER JOIN QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP B
    ON A.CATE_NO = B.PRNT_NO
 WHERE 1=1
          AND 1= (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(CATE_NO) = 0 THEN 0
                      ELSE 1
                  END GB
            FROM QUADMAX_SDZ.T_CATE_TEMP
           WHERE 1=1
             AND DEPT_LVL = 3
            [AND PRNT_NO = @@중분류@@]
           ) 
  [AND A.PRNT_NO = @@중분류@@] 
GROUP BY A.CATE_NO
     , A.CATE_NM
     , A.DEPT_LVL

  from quadmax_sdz.t_camp_group  
 where DEL_F = 'N' /* 삭제플래그 처리 */
   and CAMP_GRP_END_DT >= date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') /* 조회일자보다 종료일이 나중인 캠페인 리스트만 조회*/

/* 그룹 == @@그룹@@ */

select CAMP_ID
     , CAMP_NM 
  from quadmax_sdz.t_campaign  
 where CAMP_GRP_ID =  @@그룹@@ /* 'CPGP202400000006' */
   and DEL_F = 'N' /* 삭제플래그 처리 */
   and CAMP_END_DT >= date_format(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') /* 조회일자보다 종료일이 나중인 캠페인 리스트만 조회*/

SELECT A.FNNL_ID as CD
     , A.FNNL_NM as CD_NAME
  FROM quadmax_sdz.t_funnel A
       inner  join  ( 
       					/*t_funnel_node_out_list테이블에 존재하는 값만 필터링*/
				       SELECT FNNL_ID
				           FROM quadmax_sdz.t_funnel_node_out_list
				          WHERE 1=1				
				          GROUP BY FNNL_ID
       				) B
	    ON A.FNNL_ID = B.FNNL_ID
where A.del_f = 'N'
AND A.FNNL_STS_ID <> '010'
 GROUP BY A.FNNL_ID
     , A.FNNL_NM
 ORDER BY A.FNNL_ID desc

SELECT CONCAT(A.FNNL_ID,'_',A.NODE_ID) AS CD
     , C.NODE_NM AS CD_NAME
  FROM quadmax_sdz.t_funnel_node_out_list A
       INNER JOIN
       ( SELECT FNNL_ID
              , NODE_ID
              , MAX(SEQ) AS SEQ
           FROM quadmax_sdz.t_funnel_node_out_list
          WHERE 1=1
           [AND FNNL_ID = @@퍼널ID선택@@]

          GROUP BY FNNL_ID
              , NODE_ID
       ) B
    ON A.FNNL_ID = B.FNNL_ID
   AND A.NODE_ID = B.NODE_ID
   AND A.SEQ = B.SEQ
       LEFT OUTER JOIN quadmax_sdz.t_funnel_rulescript C
    ON A.FNNL_ID = C.FNNL_ID
  AND A.NODE_ID = C.NODE_ID
 WHERE A.OUT_YN = 'Y'

/* 표준 쿼리
SELECT CONCAT(A.FNNL_ID,'_',A.NODE_ID) AS CD
     , C.NODE_NM AS CD_NAME
  FROM t_funnel_node_out_list A
       INNER JOIN
       ( SELECT FNNL_ID
              , NODE_ID
              , MAX(SEQ) AS SEQ
           FROM t_funnel_node_out_list
          WHERE 1=1
           [AND FNNL_ID = @@퍼널ID선택@@]
          GROUP BY FNNL_ID
              , NODE_ID
       ) B
    ON A.FNNL_ID = B.FNNL_ID
   AND A.NODE_ID = B.NODE_ID
   AND A.SEQ = B.SEQ
       LEFT OUTER JOIN t_funnel_rulescript C
    ON A.FNNL_ID = C.FNNL_ID
  AND A.NODE_ID = C.NODE_ID
 WHERE A.OUT_YN = 'Y'
*/
